title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
summary: OpenAI 提出部署模拟方法，利用真实对话数据在发布前预测 AI 模型行为，提升安全性和评估准确性。
analysis_note: 方法创新，聚焦安全评估，但未开源或提供具体技术细节，实用性待验证。
